case_title: MAIGRET, CHRISTOPHER VS ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: VENUE CHALLENGE FILED BY AUTO COLLISION CENTER
CERT MAIL TO RANDY GREENBLAT OWNER AUTO COLLISION CENTER, RETURNED TO COURT SIGNED.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MAIGRET, CHRISTOPHER AS TO DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY BOOTH, BRENDON DBA ALLSTATE INSURANCE CO. MILLER, JO DBA ALLSTATE INSURANCE CO. AUTO COLLISION CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO ALICIA BAILY.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-30-2005, OFF CALENDAR DEFT DOES NOT WAIVED NO SERVICE.
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-20-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO CT CORP SYSTEM AGENT FOR SERVICE ALL STATE INS. CO RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY BOOTH, BRENDON DBA ALLSTATE INSURANCE CO. MILLER, JO DBA ALLSTATE INSURANCE CO. AUTO COLLISION CENTER THE COURT DISMISSES DEFT. COLLISION CENTER WITH PREJUDICE AT PLFT'S REQUEST. THE COURT DISMISSES THE REMAINDER OF THE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE, BECAUSE PLFT'S CLAIM IS NOT YET RIPE FOR DECISION. PLFT MAY REFILE THIS ACTION AFTER JUDGMENT IS ENTERED IN HIS PENDING CLAIM RELATED TO THE UNDERLYING COLLISION OF FEBRUARY 2004. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
LETTER SENT BY CHRISTOPHER MAIGRET OBJECTING TO THE CHANGE OF VENUE REQUEST.
